category_sources: Official Istio homepage describes Istio as a service mesh for cloud-native workloads and Kubernetes/traditional workloads.
source_facts.description says istioctl is the Istio configuration command-line utility.
display_name_sources: Official Istio command reference page is titled istioctl.
docs_sources: Official Istio documentation page is the dedicated documentation surface for the project.
Official Istio istioctl command reference documents the CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/istio/istio; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Istio homepage and docs describe service mesh traffic management, telemetry, security, and Kubernetes-oriented operation.
source_facts.description identifies the Istio configuration CLI.
